source_pr.title: *: start GCWorker after bootstrap finish.
source_pr.body:
GCWorker should not be start when newTikvStore, because
the system maybe not bootstrap yet. Move the logic to
BootstrapSession.

@disksing @zimulala

symptoms: + wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
failure_signature: + wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: GCWorker was started during store creation even when the system might not be bootstrapped yet, leading to timing-dependent failures and sleep-based synchronization in session creation. This PR starts GCWorker after BootstrapSession completes and removes sleep-based waiting by using proper startup ordering/synchronization.
fix_pattern: Start background workers only after bootstrap; replace sleep-based sync with deterministic startup ordering.

evidence: evidence: + wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
files: domain/domain.go, session.go, store/tikv/kv.go, store/tikv/gc_worker.go, store/tikv/gc_worker_test.go, store/tikv/store_test.go
